mentions.note: Good yield, can make a comeback; preferred alternative to Manpower.
AI-displacement fears look overplayed given a strong quarter, robust full-year guidance, and accelerating small-business hiring; stock has rebounded from an $85 April low to $98.

Q3: +20% organic growth, +22% operating income, +27% YTD cash flow; $1B new buyback, ~5% dividend, strong Paycor integration; trades <17x earnings, down from $161 to $93; no recession signals in client data.
Strong SMB payroll processing fundamentals, 15x earnings, 4.6% yield, but macro morass (recession fears) creates headwind. No visible catalyst despite quality business.
Payroll processing firm crushed by AI disruption fears; market believes it can be replaced but fundamentals solid—momentum against it.
